dashboard.heroTitle: Welcome to the Timan Service Portal
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Your central access to service management, TSB overview and technical documentation. Easily manage cases, view KPIs and access the latest resources.

claims.title: Service / Claims
claims.desc: Create and manage claim cases, track status and see machine history.

tsb.title: TSB Portal
tsb.desc: Technical Service Bulletins. View required updates and safety checks.

warranty.title: Warranty Registrations
warranty.desc: Register new machines on delivery to the customer. Warranty registration must be created at handover. Warranty or claims cannot be processed for machines that are not registered.

info.title: Service Information
info.desc: News, tips and tricks, and general information about maintenance of Timan products.
